name: Fragola S.p.A
message: [AI generated] Fragola S.p.A is an Italian company well-known in the field of fluid power transmission systems. With roots dating back to 1900, the company specializes in engineering and manufacturing of standard and custom-made hydraulic fittings and systems. Fragola works across various industries, including construction, agriculture, marine, and aerospace, and offers targeted solutions to meet unique requirements.
